name: Adler
description: A Chaos defender with a stormy, unpredictable edge—more niche pick than headline hero, but satisfying if you like holding the line when fights turn messy.

seo.title: Adler — Defense
seo.description: Meet Adler, a Chaos defense Esper in Neverness to Everness—steady guard presence with an offbeat mood for players who enjoy defensive play.
